title: Blood Sugar Tracker
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Take control of your glucose - one honest reading at a time.

This 123-page blood sugar tracker turns the daily routine of finger sticks, meal logs, and insulin doses into something you can actually learn from. Built for type 1, type 2, gestational, and prediabetic readers who want to understand their numbers, not just record them.

Who it's for:
- People newly diagnosed with diabetes who need a simple system
- Long-term diabetics tired of spreadsheet apps
- Anyone tracking A1C trends, insulin response, or carb-glucose patterns
- Caregivers monitoring a family member's diabetes

What's inside:
- 100+ daily logs: fasting, pre/post meal, bedtime readings (mg/dL or mmol/L)
- Carb count, insulin dose, exercise, and mood columns side-by-side
- Weekly review pages: averages, highs, lows, and what your body told you
- Monthly A1C and weight tracker
- Reference: target ranges, hypo/hyper symptoms, and questions to ask your doctor

Travel-ready 6x9 size. Wide grids for tired eyes and post-meal hands. No app to forget your password to.

Your glucose meter gives you a number. This book turns it into knowledge.

Buy now and bring better data to your next endocrinology visit.
categories: BISAC: HEALTH & FITNESS / Diseases & Conditions / Diabetes
